menu.welcome: Prepare for an epic Cosmicon battle!
menu.session_won: You've won this round! Find another bar encounter to play again.
menu.trashcan_hunter_welcome: The Cosmicon players eye you warily. Word of your Trashcan hunting has spread. 'Trashcan Hunter Level {0},' someone whispers.

help.title: === How to Play Cosmicon ===
help.intro: Cosmicon is a turn-based dice battle game from Honkai: Star Rail.
help.rule_1: - Each player has a character card with dice pool, HP, ATK/DEF Levels
help.rule_2: - Roll dice each turn, select required number based on current phase
help.rule_3: - Attack Value = sum of selected dice + Strength stacks
help.rule_4: - Defense Value = sum of selected dice + Toughness stacks
help.casino_1: If the Interstellar Casino mod is also loaded, access the Cosmicon Dice Lounge from the Casino main menu.
help.casino_2: Features: Challenge the Gatekeeper (5k stargems) and Host a Tournament (15k stargems, requires defeating the Gatekeeper).
help.casino_3: Collab features unlock after completing the Cosmicon tutorial at bars.

battle.weather_none_desc: No weather is active yet. Weather will appear starting from turn 2.

errors.market_too_small: This market is too small to host Cosmicon games.

status_desc.poison_desc: End of turn: receive damage = layer count, then layers -1
status_desc.strength_desc: Attack value bonus = layer count when attacking
status_desc.toughness_desc: Defense value bonus = layer count when defending
status_desc.forcefield_desc: Does not receive conventional attack damage
status_desc.perforation_desc: Ignore defense value and Forcefield when attacking
status_desc.combo_desc: Perform 1 extra attack based on current attack value
status_desc.counter_desc: If defense > attack, deal difference damage to attacker
status_desc.hack_desc: Transform opponent's highest dice value to 2 (Prismatic Dice unaffected)
status_desc.thorns_desc: Before resolution: receive damage = layer count, cleared after
status_desc.arise_desc: Transform lowest dice to that dice's max value (Prismatic Dice unaffected)
status_desc.level_up_desc: Upgrade dice rarity and max faces (up to d12)
status_desc.last_stand_desc: Reduce HP to 1, gain bonus = HP reduction amount
status_desc.overload_desc: Adds attack value = layers when attacking, but deals 50% of layers as self-damage when defending
status_desc.siphon_desc: Recover HP = percentage of damage dealt
status_desc.destined_desc: Dice must be selected after rolling
status_desc.awakening_desc: Double all dice values after selection
status_desc.reflect_desc: Deal instant damage after receiving damage
status_desc.yao_guang_rerolls_desc: Gain extra rerolls equal to layer count
status_desc.cyrene_tally_desc: Cumulative ATK+DEF tally: {0}/24. When the total exceeds 24, Attack Level becomes 5 and gains Arise each turn.

weather.frost_desc: If the attacker's selected dice contain matching numbers, increases their Defense Level by 1 in the next turn.
weather.frog_rain_desc: Neither side will roll the minimum value on their dice.
weather.fine_snow_desc: If you don't reroll during your attack turn, gain 3 stacks of Toughness that can only be used next turn.
weather.fish_rain_desc: Both sides additionally gain 1 reroll attempt during Attack/Defense.
weather.parhelion_desc: Gain 2 extra reroll chances, but also gain 2 stacks of Thorns when rerolling.
weather.cyclonic_swarm_desc: When either side attacks, gain Combo. Performs 1 additional attack based on the current Attack.
weather.sleet_desc: Players without full HP gain Counter, and their DEF Level increases by 2.
weather.solar_eclipse_desc: When either side attacks, if the selected dice contain different values, increases Attack by 4.
weather.blizzard_desc: When the defender is selecting dice, if DEF is 8 or less, they gain Forcefield this turn.
weather.scorching_sun_desc: When either side attacks, Siphons HP equal to 50% of the DMG dealt.
weather.acid_rain_desc: At the start of each turn: The side with more HP will be inflicted with 1 stack of Poison.
weather.high_temperature_desc: At the start of the turn: The side with less HP gains 2 stacks of Strength, lasting until the end of this weather.
weather.storm_desc: Additionally increases both sides' ATK Level by 1 and DEF Level by 1.
weather.moderate_snow_desc: When attacking or defending, if either side's selected dice contains 3 identical numbers, heals 10 HP.
weather.heavy_snow_desc: When selecting dice, if the selected number includes 7, ATK/DEF increases by 4.
weather.dust_desc: When the attacker selects dice, if all dice values are odd numbers, gains 3 stacks of Strength.
weather.sea_of_clouds_desc: When transformed to this weather, both sides gain 1 Prismatic Dice use.
weather.rainbow_desc: When the attacker selects dice, if attack value is 10 or less, gains Perforation.
weather.drought_desc: Based on the opponent's Defense Level, the attacker gains 3 additional ATK per level.
weather.lunisolar_luminance_desc: When the attacker selects dice, if current HP is 3 or less, ATK is doubled.
weather.crepuscular_rays_desc: Player with lower HP gains Combo when attacking.
weather.temporal_storm_desc: When the attack selects dice, if all dice values are 6s, the HP of both sides will be switched.
weather.sunshower_desc: The defender's dice cannot roll the maximum value.
weather.sunny_desc: Both sides gain 5 stacks of Strength, lasting until the end of this weather.
weather.dry_thunderstorm_desc: When the attacker selects dice, directly deal 3 Instant Damage when attacking.
weather.toxic_fog_desc: Both sides are inflicted with 2 stacks of Poison.
weather.the_decisive_moment_desc: Both sides gain 5 stacks of Strength. (NPC-Exclusive)
weather.drizzle_desc: When selecting dice, if the selected number includes 6, the Poison state is removed from themselves. (Story-Exclusive)

acheron.name: Acheron
acheron.passive: When attacking: If all selected dice numbers are 4, this attack gains Perforation: for each successful Perforation triggered, increases ATK Level by 1. Perforation: When attacking, ignores the opponent's Defense and Forcefield. Attack Level: The required number of dice that must be selected for attack.

castorice.name: Castorice
castorice.passive: When defending: If DMG taken is no less than 8, increases ATK Level and DEF Level by 1. If DMG taken is no more than 5, immediately deals 3 Instant Damage. Attack/Defense Level: The required number of dice that must be selected for attack/defense. Instant Damage: Deals damage instantly, skipping the calculation of Final DMG.

firefly.name: Firefly
firefly.passive: When attacking, If the selected dice contain 2 pairs of matching numbers, this attack gains Combo. If this unit has full HP, increases Attack by 5. Combo: Performs 1 additional attack based on the current Attack.

robin.name: Robin
robin.passive: When attacking: If all selected dice are even numbers, the selected dice gain a Level Up. Level Up: Upgrades eligible dice by increasing their Rarity and max number of faces up to twelve. Note: The d12 dice are treated as Prismatic Dice.

the_herta.name: The Herta
the_herta.passive: At the end of the turn: Gains 1 Prismatic Dice Use. If its special effect has been triggered more than 4 times, subsequently gains Arise each turn. Arise: Before the end of the turn, randomly turns the selected die with the lowest value to that die's maximum value. (Prismatic Dice are unaffected)

kafka.name: Kafka
kafka.passive: When attacking: For each different number on the selected dice, applies 1 stack of Poison. When defense fails, removes 1 stack of Poison from the opponent. Poison: At the end of the turn, takes DMG based on the number of stacks, then reduce the number of stacks by 1.

aventurine.name: Aventurine
aventurine.passive: When attacking: Gains 1 stack of Toughness for every 1 odd number in the selected dice. When Toughness accumulates to 7 stacks, immediately deals 7 Instant Damage and removes 7 stacks of Toughness. Toughness: When defending, provides a DEF bonus based on the number of stacks. Instant Damage: Deals damage instantly, skipping the calculation of Final DMG.

march_7th.name: March 7th
march_7th.passive: When attacking or defending: For each 1 pair of matching numbers on selected dice, deals 3 Instant Damage. Instant Damage: Deals damage instantly, skipping the calculation of Final DMG.

dan_heng.name: Dan Heng
dan_heng.passive: When attacking: If Attack is no less than 18, next time when defending, increases DEF Level by 3, and gains Counter. After defense ends, DEF Level will be restored to the initial value. Defense Level: The required number of dice that must be selected for defense. Counter: When attacked, if your DEF is higher, deals DMG to the attacker equal to the difference.

sparxie.name: Sparxie
sparxie.passive: When attacking or defending: If the selected dice include identical numbers, gains Hack. Hack: Before the end of the turn, turns your opponent's selected die with the highest value into a 2. (Prismatic Dice are unaffected)

yao_guang.name: Yao Guang
yao_guang.passive: When attacking: Gain 4 reroll attempts; after exceeding 2 rerolls in a single turn, each reroll grants 2 stacks of Thorns. Additionally, if Attack is no less than 18, removes all Thorns and gains 1 Prismatic Dice use. Thorns: Before the end of the turn, takes DMG based on the number of stacks. This effect is removed at the end of the turn.

cyrene.name: Cyrene
cyrene.passive: This unit's ATK and DEF values are tallied each turn. When the total exceeds 24, Attack Level becomes 5, and subsequently gains Arise each turn. Attack Level: The required number of dice that must be selected for attack. Arise: Before the end of the turn, randomly turns the selected die with the lowest value to that die's maximum value. (Prismatic Dice are unaffected)

phainon.name: Phainon
phainon.passive: When attacking: Siphons HP equal to 50% of the DMG dealt. When defending: If all selected dice have the same number, gains Unyielding, which can be triggered up to 1 time. Siphon: When attacking, restores HP equal to a portion of the DMG dealt. Unyielding: While active, always keeps 1 HP.

hyacine.name: Hyacine
hyacine.passive: After attacking: Sets Strength stacks to 50% of this attack's value. If all selected dice numbers are 6, sets it to 100% and Heals 6 HP. Strength: When attacking, provides an ATK bonus based on the number of stacks. Heal: Restores a specified amount of HP.

trashcan.name: Trashcan
trashcan.passive: After attacking: Gains 2 stack(s) of Strength. If all the selected dice show even numbers, gains 4 stack(s) of Strength instead. Strength: When attacking, provides an ATK bonus based on the number of stacks.

evolution.name: "Evolution"
evolution.description: After selected, provides 2 points and doubles ATK/DEF

destiny.name: "Destiny"
destiny.description: All faces grant Destined - dice must be selected

doctors_advice.name: "Doctor's Advice"
doctors_advice.description: Special faces heal HP equal to face value

last_words.name: "Last Words"
last_words.description: Available at HP <= 8, doubles ATK/DEF on special faces

repeater.name: "Repeater"
repeater.description: Available after selecting face 4 twice, grants Combo

miracle.name: "Miracle"
miracle.description: Available after selecting face 1 nine times, rolls 99

loan.name: "Loan"
loan.description: Grants Overload stacks equal to face value

astral_shield.name: "Astral Shield"
astral_shield.description: Defense only, grants Forcefield on special faces

oath.name: "Oath"
oath.description: Defense only, grants Unyielding on special faces

big_red_button.name: "Big Red Button"
big_red_button.description: Available from turn 5+ when attacking, grants Last Stand

heartbeat.name: "Heartbeat"
heartbeat.description: Grants +1 Prismatic use on special faces

berserker.name: "Berserker"
berserker.description: Grants Thorns stacks equal to face value

magic_bullet.name: "Magic Bullet"
magic_bullet.description: Deals 3 instant damage on special faces

condition.hp_threshold_low: Available when HP is {0} or less
condition.hp_threshold_high: Available when HP is {0} or more

popup.title: Select Prismatic Dice
popup.warning_destined: Warning: This dice will be marked MUST SELECT after rolling!

equip.title: SELECT PRISMATIC DICE
equip.effect_heal: Heals HP equal to face value

bar_event.tutorial_prompt: A cloaked figure approaches you in the bar, dice clicking in their palms. 'Care for a game, rookie? I'll go easy on you.'
bar_event.standard_prompt: A Cosmicon player at the bar waves you over. 'Fancy a match? Winner takes their pick of the spoils...'
bar_event.declined: You politely decline and return to your drink.
bar_event.trashcan_hunter_prompt: The Cosmicon regulars immediately recognize you. 'It's the Trashcan Hunter! Level {0}!' One of them eagerly offers you a seat at their table.

tutorial.no_prismatic_allowed: Tutorial mode: Prismatic dice are disabled for this game.
tutorial.g1_reward: You unlocked the character [Sparxie]! Play the next tutorial game to unlock more.
tutorial.g2_reward: You unlocked [Acheron] and the [Repeater] prismatic dice! You can now play random encounters at bars.
tutorial.g1_t1_attack_roll: You are the attacker! Roll the dice by clicking anywhere.
tutorial.g1_t1_attack_select: Select your highest dice to deal more damage. Your attack level is 4, so you can select the 4 highest numbers.
tutorial.g1_t1_attack_wait: Wait for the opponent to select their defending dice...
tutorial.g1_t1_attack_resolve: The difference between attack and defense is dealt as damage. Click 'Continue' to resolve the turn and switch roles.
tutorial.g1_t1_defense_roll: Now you are defending! The opponent will roll first and select a number of dice equal to their attack level
tutorial.g1_t1_defense_select: You rolled matching numbers! Select the pair to trigger Sparxie's Hack ability. (3 dice in total since your defense level is 3.)
tutorial.g1_t1_defense_confirm: Click 'Confirm Defense' to block the attack. Once you confirm, try mouse-over [Hack] to view its effects.
tutorial.g1_t1_defense_wait: Click anywhere to watch the modification, your Hack ability will lower the opponent's dice value.
tutorial.g1_t1_defense_resolve: That reduced some damage! Click 'Continue' to start your next attack.
tutorial.g1_t2_attack_roll: Your turn to attack again! Wait for the initial dice roll.
tutorial.g1_t2_attack_reroll: These rolls are low. Select the D8 and the two D6 dice (the 1, 1, 2), then click 'Reroll Selected' for better numbers!
tutorial.g1_t2_attack_select: Much better! Now select your 4 best dice and confirm!
tutorial.g1_t2_attack_confirm: Hack will be triggered again since you selected 2 identical numbers. Each character has a different ability with varying trigger.
tutorial.g1_t2_attack_wait: You've mastered the basics of rolling, selecting, rerolling and character ability! Now watch the resolution play out...
tutorial.g1_victory: Victory! You unlocked the character [Sparxie]. Play the next tutorial game to unlock Acheron and the Repeater prismatic dice!
tutorial.g2_t1_defense_roll: You now play as [Acheron]! Her ability triggers when she selects all 4s on attack. For now, defend first - roll the dice!
tutorial.g2_t1_defense_select: You rolled two 4s! Select them - You'll get to use a special dice next turn!
tutorial.g2_t1_defense_resolve: Turn resolved! Click 'Continue' to start your attack.
tutorial.g2_t2_attack_roll: Now you attack! Roll first! A special [prismatic dice] icon will appear at bottom left.
tutorial.g2_t2_attack_prismatic: Click the prismatic dice icon at the bottom-left corner to add a special die to your pool!
tutorial.g2_t2_attack_select: Select the 4s (including prismatic) to trigger [Perforation]. Perforation ignores opponent's defense, this comes from Acheron's ability
tutorial.g2_t2_attack_confirm: Confirm your attack! You will also gain [Combo] from the prismatic die's special face.
tutorial.g2_t2_attack_wait: Wait for the result... (Tip: Mouse over 'Perforation' and 'Combo' in the status box to read their effects!)
tutorial.g2_t2_attack_resolve: Strategically combining character ability with prismatic dice effects is what makes all the difference! Click 'Continue' to defend again.
tutorial.g2_t2_defense_roll: The weather just changed to [Sleet]! Weather causes unpredictable effects, the current one is good for the defender. Defend now - roll the dice!
tutorial.g2_t2_defense_select: Select dice to defend yourself. Note how due to the sleet weather, you can select 2 more defending dice!
tutorial.g2_t2_defense_confirm: Confirm your defense. You can also mouse-over [Counter] to see what it does
tutorial.g2_t3_attack_roll: We can't be lucky all the time, dice roll results sometimes just can't trigger your ability.
tutorial.g2_t3_attack_prismatic: Use your Repeater prismatic die first before rerolling - let's hope we get some 4s...
tutorial.g2_t3_attack_reroll: Good! It landed on a special face granting Combo! Now select your normal dice and click 'Reroll' to try to get 2 more 4s!
tutorial.g2_t3_attack_reroll2: Still no 4s! One more reroll left. Select all your normal dice and reroll again! If no 4s pop up after this, we will have to work with what we have.
tutorial.g2_t3_attack_select: Bad luck! With Counter and a high DEF level against us, we might take damage when we attack, so using Combo here can be bad. Don't select the prismatic die!
tutorial.g2_t3_attack_confirm: Confirm your attack. It won't be your strongest, but playing safe against Counter is the right call!
tutorial.g2_t3_attack_wait: Wait for the clash! This is going to hurt...
tutorial.g2_t3_attack_resolve: The opponent's Counter punished your weak attack hard! But at least you didn't get punished twice (had you used the combo dice).
tutorial.g2_t3_defense_roll: Defend! Sleet gives you +2 Defense Level since you're not at full HP - you can select 5 dice! Roll the dice!
tutorial.g2_t3_defense_select: Select your best 5 dice to block the attack!
tutorial.g2_t3_defense_resolve: You held the line! Click 'Continue' for your final attack - make it count!
tutorial.g2_t4_attack_roll: Final attack! Your prismatic uses have run out, but a Perforation attack with three 4s can win the game!
tutorial.g2_t4_attack_select: Three 4s! Select them all to trigger Acheron's ability - finish it!
tutorial.g2_t4_attack_confirm: Confirm to claim victory. You've mastered prismatic dice and weather tactics and unlocked Acheron and the Repeater prismatic dice.
tutorial.g2_victory: Victory! Visit bars to find random encounters and unlock more characters and dice!

gallery.no_prismatic_unlocked: No prismatic dice unlocked yet. Win random encounters to unlock more dice!

casino.gatekeeper_victory: The Gatekeeper nods slowly. 'You've earned your shot at the big stage.'
casino.gatekeeper_defeat: The Gatekeeper watches you leave. 'Come back when you're ready.'
casino.gatekeeper_unlock_tournament: Tournament unlocked! You can now Host a Tournament.
casino.tournament_locked: Defeat the Gatekeeper to unlock the tournament.
casino.tournament_start: The 8-player elimination tournament begins! You are contestant #{0}.
casino.tournament_runner_up: Runner-up! You reached the Grand Final but fell short.
casino.tournament_credits_earned: Tournament earnings: {0} credits ({1} wins x {2} base).
casino.tournament_error_load: Error: Could not load tournament data.

lounge.welcome: Welcome to the Cosmicon Dice Lounge. The air crackles with competitive energy.
lounge.trashcan_hunter_greeting: The lounge attendants nod respectfully. 'Welcome back, Trashcan Hunter Level {0}.'
lounge.tutorial_required: The bouncer stops you. 'Sorry, you need to learn the basics at the bar first. Come back after you've completed your Cosmicon training.'
lounge.gatekeeper_insufficient: You don't have enough Stargems for the entry fee. You need 5,000 Stargems.
lounge.tournament_locked: Defeat the Gatekeeper to unlock the tournament.
lounge.tournament_insufficient: You need 15,000 Stargems to host a tournament.
lounge.help_1: - Cosmicon Dice is a turn-based dice battle game
lounge.help_2: - Challenge the Gatekeeper to earn rewards and unlock the Tournament
